title: oldenlandia monocephala
intro: Oldenlandia monocephala, also known as Smallhead Blume, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is an herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and other parts of Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia monocephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and treat respiratory infections, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea or tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
